arguments.content: Renewable energy can replace fossil fuels entirely by 2050
Transitioning to green energy will destroy millions of jobs overnight

research_points.fact: Global temperatures have risen by 1.1'C since 1880.

speeches.title: Opening Speech on Climate Change
speeches.content: Climate change is the defining crisis of our generation and we must act now before it is too late

arguments.content: AI in classrooms will reduce human interaction and emotional development
AI can personalize learning for every student based on their pace

research_points.fact: 60% of educators believe AI tools improve student engagement

speeches.title: AI Should Enter Classrooms
speeches.content: Artificial Intelligence is not a threat to education but a powerful tool that can make quality learning accessible to every child on the planet

arguments.content: UBI can eliminate poverty and give people freedom to pursue meaningful work
UBI is economically unsustainable and will cause massive inflation

research_points.fact: Finland's UBI pilot showed improved wellbeing and mental health among recipients

speeches.title: Case for Universal Basic Income
speeches.content: Every human being deserves the dignity of financial security and Universal Basic Income is the most direct path to achieving that goal
